nasb.text: So they shall wash their hands and their feet, so that they will not die; and it shall be a perpetual statute for them, for Aaron and his descendants throughout their generations.”

esv.text: They shall wash their hands and their feet, so that they may not die. It shall be a statute forever to them, even to him and to his offspring throughout their generations.”

cnv.text: 他們要洗手洗腳，免得死亡。這要作他們永遠的定例，就是作亞倫和他的後裔世世代代永遠的定例。”

ccb.text: 他们要洗手洗脚，免得死亡，这是亚伦和他的子孙世世代代都要守的条例。”
